## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate:env`
- [ ] `npm run validate:docs`
- [ ] `npm run validate:templates`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:prod`
- [ ] `npm run verify:release`

## Review Notes

- User-facing behavior:
- Architecture or data impact:
- Security or privacy impact:

## Visual Changes

Attach screenshots or recordings for UI changes. Include desktop and mobile views when layout changed.
